data.title: Inventor from Willowick, Ohio creates new paddle-style game called SERVE to enhance fun for players.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from Willowick, Ohio, shared his innovative creation - the SERVE, a new racquet-type game aimed at boosting enjoyment for players. The game promises to be both fun and demanding, calling for physical prowess, agility, and quick reflexes. The inventor's vision is to provide a fresh and exciting gaming experience for enthusiasts.

data.title: Study at CHOP shows combining diet and medication could treat childhood tumors like neuroblastoma.
data.description: A recent preclinical study conducted at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) discovered a promising new strategy in treating neuroblastoma and other cancers driven by the MYC oncogene. The study revealed that when a specialized diet was combined with an existing medication, remarkable results were observed. This innovative approach has the potential to revolutionize the treatment of these cancers. The findings offer hope for patients and healthcare professionals alike, with the study pointing towards a potential breakthrough in the management of MYC-driven cancer cases. Further research and clinical trials are needed to validate these findings, but initial outcomes indicate a significant advancement in the field of cancer treatment. This discovery could impact a substantial number of individuals affected by neuroblastoma and similar cancer types, presenting a new avenue for more effective and targeted therapies.

data.title: Devon Energy (NYSE: DVN) to report Q3 2025 results on Nov. 5 after US financial markets close. Presentation on www.devonenergy.com.
data.description: Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) revealed plans to disclose its third-quarter 2025 financial performance on November 5, after the closure of U.S. financial markets. Interested parties can access the earnings report and presentation concerning the third-quarter outcomes for 2025 on the company's official website, www.devonenergy.com.

data.title: AvionTEq expands in Asia-Pacific after MRO Asia success, engaging with customers and airlines. CEO Fred Bostani discusses priorities for 2025-2026.Characters: 123
data.description: AvionTEq had a successful presence at MRO Asia-Pacific 2025, held at the Singapore Expo on September 17-18. The event showcased significant engagement with both existing clients and new contacts from airlines, MROs, and aviation manufacturers within the region. CEO Fred Bostani highlighted the importance of in-person discussions in Singapore, which allowed for a clear alignment on customers' priorities for 2025-2026. These priorities include aspects such as fleet readiness, reliability, and adaptable acquisition models for avionics test equipment.

data.title: David Jennings promoted to Vice President, Clinical Services at HOMELINK in Waterloo, Iowa.
data.description: HOMELINK, a leading provider of integrated specialty services for workers’ compensation and group health, has promoted David Jennings, PT, DPT, to vice president of clinical services in Waterloo, Iowa. Dr. Jennings played a crucial role in enhancing HOMELINK’s efforts to achieve outstanding clinical outcomes for patients and clients, leading to his recent promotion. With a focus on refining clinical strategies through disciplined processes, HOMELINK continues to prioritize excellence in its services.

data.title: Albert Straus awarded OTA's Organic Lifetime Achievement Award for pioneering sustainable dairy farming practices.
data.description: Albert Straus, a leading figure in the organic industry, was recently awarded the Organic Trade Association's highest honor for his contributions to sustainable and climate-smart dairy farming practices. Straus has been recognized for his pioneering work in promoting environmentally-friendly agriculture methods. This award highlights his dedication to advancing the organic farming sector. The OTA's recognition underscores Straus's significant impact on the industry, with his efforts setting a positive example for others. The honor serves as a testament to his commitment to promoting sustainable practices within dairy farming.

data.title: Hyundai IONIQ 9 named to Wards' 10 Best Engines list, marking their 19th award; accolades received for 2025.
data.description: Hyundai, headquartered in Fountain Valley, California, was recently honored with the 19th Engine & Propulsion System Award by Wards. The IONIQ 9, their latest electric vehicle, was selected as one of the top 10 Best Engines & Propulsion Systems for 2025. This esteemed accolade signifies Hyundai's continued excellence in the automotive industry.
Thai PM insisting he will trigger snap elections next year and enable a charter referendum.

data.title: Franklin Templeton utilizes BNB Chain for BENJI expansion following collaboration with Binance.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached a low point of 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. This has led to a total of 223,000 new jobs being added in the month of April alone, surpassing economists' predictions. The job growth has been primarily seen in the professional and business services sector, as well as in the healthcare industry. This positive trend in the job market has resulted in greater consumer confidence and is expected to have a positive impact on the overall economy.

data.title: Piccalio transitions from wooden toys to kid-friendly furniture, unveiling brand refresh. Founded in 2020.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Los Angeles, Piccalio, a brand known for its innovative children's spaces products, unveiled a new brand identity. This change signifies its shift from a popular wooden toy company to a major player in the children's furniture segment. Established in 2020 in Los Angeles, the brand has undergone significant growth to become a prominent voice in the industry.

data.title: Homestead Entertainment and Bronx Bridge Films agree on 5-year deal to deliver faith-based films to Black audiences.
data.description: In a significant move, Homestead Entertainment and Bronx Bridge Films have formalized their collaboration through a lucrative five-year agreement to produce and distribute diverse, faith-based narratives for the Black community. The partnership, based in Los Angeles, was announced on September 24, 2025. This deal ensures that a series of thought-provoking films catering to underrepresented audiences will be brought to the forefront in the coming years.

data.title: Dr. Daniel Black named PVAMU 2025-2026 Toni Morrison Writer-in-Residence in Prairie View, Texas.
data.description: In Prairie View, Texas, a notable announcement was made on September 24, 2025, by Prairie View A&M University revealing Dr. Daniel Black as the 2025-2026 Toni Morrison Writer-in-Residence. Dr. Black, a revered author, professor, mentor, and influential figure in African American Studies, has been selected for this prestigious position. This news marks a significant honor for both Dr. Black and the university, highlighting their commitment to excellence in the academic field.

data.title: By Light Enterprise attains CMMC Level 2 certification. By Light Professional IT Services joins elite group.
data.description: By Light Professional IT Services LLC, based in McLean, Virginia, has recently obtained Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 certification. This accomplishment goes beyond their previous certification as a managed security service provider (MSSP). The certification was officially achieved on September 24, 2025. This move demonstrates By Light's commitment to cybersecurity readiness and compliance. The CMMC Level 2 certification places By Light in a specialized category of companies adhering to stringent cybersecurity standards. This certification showcases the company's dedication to enhancing its cybersecurity protocols and maintaining a high level of data security.

data.title: JasmyCoin (JASMY) holds firm at $0.01 with a 0.46% daily increase. Mixed indicators hint at a potential turnaround.
data.description: The price of JASMY continues to hold steady at $0.01, showing a slight daily increase of 0.46%. Despite a bearish MACD signal in technical analysis, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a possibility of a turnaround from oversold levels.

data.title: Belden's DataTuff Industrial Ethernet cables provide high-volume data transfer and rugged reliability, backed by 120 years of R&D and a 10-year warranty.
data.description: Belden offers a wide range of DataTuff Industrial Ethernet cables designed to provide reliable and high-speed data transfer in various industrial settings. With over 120 years of research and development, these cables undergo thorough testing and come with a 10-year warranty. The company, based in FORT WORTH, Texas, recently announced this offering on Sept. 24th.

data.title: Agents.Land, developed by Oraichain Labs, offers permissionless tokenization & listing of Thesis.io's Agent Spaces, enhancing AI-driven creator economy.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in New York, Agents.Land was unveiled by Oraichain Labs to facilitate the permissionless tokenization and listing of Thesis.io's Agent Spaces. This innovation allows creators to convert their content workspaces into token-operated hubs, providing a seamless experience. The platform launch is aimed at empowering creators and expanding the tokenization landscape, reflecting the growing trend in the blockchain industry.

data.title: CareSource donates $200,000 to 6 Wisconsin nonprofits for community health. Winners selected by public vote.
data.description: The CareSource Foundation Grant Challenge announced its grantees as determined by public voting. The nonprofit managed care organization, CareSource, unveiled the recipients from BROOKFIELD, Wis., on Sept. 24, 2025. The grants were awarded to (insert number) organizations.

data.title: Global EV and ESS Battery Pouch Film market valued at USD 854M in 2024; projected to reach USD 2000M by 2031 (12.3% CAGR).
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of September 24, 2025, the market size for EV and ESS Battery Pouch Films stands at USD 854 million for the year 2024. Projections indicate that this market is set to grow significantly, reaching a revised value of USD 2000 million by 2031. The growth rate shows a promising trend in this sector.

data.title: Novelis releases 2025 Sustainability Report: Shows 10% carbon intensity reduction in last fiscal year.
data.description: Novelis Inc., a top sustainable aluminum solutions provider and world leader in aluminum rolling and recycling, recently disclosed its sustainability report for the 2025 fiscal year. The report unveiled an impressive 10% reduction in carbon intensity. This demonstrates Novelis's commitment to environmental stewardship and sustainable practices. The company's efforts to decrease carbon intensity are crucial in addressing climate change concerns and promoting a greener future.

data.title: Airship included in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Multichannel Marketing Hubs, marking shift to intelligent platforms.
data.description: In San Francisco, Airship is pleased to announce its inaugural feature in the latest report, which showcases a growing trend towards smart platforms integrating messaging, experiences, and data. This marks a significant milestone for Airship as it embarks on a new era of innovation and technology advancement.
